title: Landsbylægen
writer: Ib Henrik Cavling, Bob Ramsing, Anker Sørensen
actors: Ebbe Langberg, Ghita Nørby, Malene Schwartz
plot: A new, single, young doctor comes to town, taking over from a retiring doctor. The young women are excited and the old women have something to gossip about. He proves to be honest, competent and reliable. Who's the lucky lady?
